name: eco
description: Asistente local de voz para Mac con Claude

scripts.dev:backend: ECO_PORT=7050 ECO_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=aditum-eco npm --workspace backend run dev
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && ECO_PORT=7050 npm --workspace electron run start
scripts.dist: npm run build:all && npm --workspace electron run build
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:all && npm --workspace electron run build:mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:all && npm --workspace electron run build:win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:all && npm --workspace electron run build:linux
scripts.release:win: npm run build:all && npm --workspace electron run release:win
scripts.release:mac: npm run build:all && npm --workspace electron run release:mac
